assumption_text: The civilian denominator uses the overlapping town-population band 20,000-30,000 rather than the full 5,000-30,000 literature spread.
rationale: The narrower Cambridge range overlaps with, and is more useful than, the broader Bird & Ottanelli range for a bounded town-level exposure estimate.

assumption_text: The massacre episode is operationalized as three days, from federal entry on 1967-10-05 through the point after 1967-10-07 when the worst killing had stopped.
rationale: This is conservative and matches the strongest date anchors found in the source set.

assumption_text: Famine, blockade, and deprivation mortality are excluded from dr_v1_direct for this bundle.
rationale: Project rules define the baseline DR as direct violent deaths only, and the whole-war famine narrative would otherwise swamp bounded direct-violence episodes.
